# nano supports tabbed editing

The nano editor should support opening multiple files in tabs for easy switching.

## Acceptance Criteria

- Multiple files can be opened in separate tabs
- A tab bar is visible showing open files
- The user can switch between tabs
- Closing a tab returns to the previous tab
